commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the omitted live-session scope fields and regression; maintainer review is still needed for the compatibility/security tradeoff before merge.; Needs attention: The patch hardens mutable-header spoofing, but incomplete live-session scope fingerprinting can preserve stale token-bound authorization context.; Review finding: [P1] Include every scoped token field in live-session r... commands.review_summary:
The PR moves MCP loopback context from generated request headers and OPENCLAW_MCP_* scope env vars into server-issued scoped bearer tokens, updates CLI live-session handling and live probes, and adds gateway/CLI regressions.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +130. Total +237 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible because MCP loopback scope comes from mutable headers, and the PR-introduced stale-token bug is source-reproducible because the live-session reuse fingerprint omits fields carried by the scoped token.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the omitted live-session scope fields and regression; maintainer review is still needed for the compatibility/security tradeoff before merge.
